description_long: This is a high-ankle, lace-up boot designed for rugged urban use, featuring a robust construction with a thick, lugged rubber sole for enhanced traction. The upper is made from a combination of smooth and textured brown synthetic or leather material, providing both durability and style. The boot has metal eyelets for the laces, which are threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern, and a pull tab at the back for easy wearing. The toe area is rounded and reinforced, while the heel and ankle sections are padded for comfort and support. The interior appears to be lined with a softer, likely fabric material for added comfort. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for both functional and casual urban wear.
description: A brown, high-ankle lace-up boot with a thick, lugged sole and reinforced toe, combining smooth and textured materials for durability and style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, criss-cross lacing, and padded tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the textured upper, metal eyelets, and thick lugged sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pull tab, padded heel, and seam details along the back.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the boot's profile and construction details.
